channel.title: Meta on Sharad Raj
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on Sharad Raj

item.title: Blog authoring showcase (math, figures, code, markdown)
item.description: This post is a living reference for everything you can drop into a normal article: front matter, math, the fig shortcode, plain images, highlighted code with line numbers, links, lists, and quotes. Copy the fenced blocks into your own .md files.
